blogs.title: CBP Newsroom
blogs.description: Official U.S. Customs and Border Protection news, announcements, and updates covering trade enforcement, border security, and system changes to ACE, AES/AESDirect, and eAPIS.

blogs.title: ACE System Notices and Updates
blogs.description: System status notices, maintenance windows, and technical updates for the Automated Commercial Environment (ACE) and related trade systems.

blogs.title: Trade Statistics and Data Portal
blogs.description: Statistical releases and data portal updates covering trade volumes, enforcement actions, traveler statistics, drug seizures, and intellectual property rights enforcement.
